mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL( (SELECT BALANCE FROM POINT WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id} AND USER_TYPE = #{user_type} ORDER BY POINT_ID DESC LIMIT 1), 0)
SELECT POINT_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, DESCRIPTION, BALANCE, CREATED_AT FROM POINT WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id} AND USER_TYPE = #{user_type} ORDER BY POINT_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POINT (USER_ID, USER_TYPE, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, DESCRIPTION, BALANCE, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{user_type}, #{point_type}, #{point_amount}, #{description}, #{balance}, NOW())
